# metinet.de

> A personal tech hub exploring software development, agentic AI and open-source projects.

metinet.de is the website of Metin Özkan, a software engineer based in Berlin, Germany. The site covers AI-assisted development, software engineering practices, and open-source tooling. Content is published in both English and German.

## Blog Posts (English)

{% assign en_posts = site.posts | where: "lang", "en" | sort: "date" | reverse -%}
{% for post in en_posts -%}
- [{{ post.title }}]({{ post.url | absolute_url }}): {{ post.description | default: post.excerpt | strip_html | truncate: 200 }}
{% endfor %}

## Blog Posts (Deutsch)

{% assign de_posts = site.posts | where: "lang", "de" | sort: "date" | reverse -%}
{% for post in de_posts -%}
- [{{ post.title }}]({{ post.url | absolute_url }}): {{ post.description | default: post.excerpt | strip_html | truncate: 200 }}
{% endfor %}

## Key Topics

- AI-assisted software development (GitHub Copilot, LLM-based coding)
- Software architecture and engineering practices
- Developer tooling and workflows
- Open-source projects

## Feeds

- [RSS Feed (English)](https://metinet.de/feed-en.xml)
- [RSS Feed (Deutsch)](https://metinet.de/feed-de.xml)
- [RSS Feed (All)](https://metinet.de/feed.xml)
